description_for_human: Independent analytical research at the intersection of technology, economics, and human behavior.
description_for_model: Access research articles by Artem Papilov covering auction theory, subscription pricing economics, programmatic advertising (Prebid.js), Penrose diagrams, and AdS/CFT holographic correspondence. All content is CC BY-NC 4.0 licensed and available in 5 languages (EN, RU, ES, DE, ZH). Use llms-full.txt for complete article text.
